-- 2 of 3 --

https://www.dropbox.com/s/9678qlbanc6azd9/Kate%20Turner%202_CUT.mp3?dl=0
EXAMPLE SALES CALL:
Part #1: 	https://www.dropbox.com/s/pxlf8yqrspv6kj0/Sales%20Training.m4a?dl=0
NOTICE
Very low pressure, in fact I almost make it seem like it might not be something we're even interested in = people want what they can't have
I repeatedly say "so that we can be 100% confident" - this builds trust
I don't give away my cards, he asks what kind of funnel and I take back control saying I will need to discuss with team
I let him talk and very rarely interrupt
Or Dropbox access: 	https://www.dropbox.com/s/bmm5o34n6ajvd1l/Sales%20Call%20Flow%20-%20Eight%20Loop%20.pdf?dl=0
Email to send after first call:
Hey [Name],
Great to connect with you yesterday and to hear more about your business.
As mentioned, you have struggled to get your funnel and Facebook ad campaigns to work in a way that can generate consistent and high quality leads for your business and are now ready to
move into a space where you can start to hit $10K/mths without having to try to figure this all out on your own.
I've have discussed your situation with the team and we feel we can get you some VERY big wins (I forgot to mention - share success story here if you have) so this is a space we are super
comfortable with.
Would you be free to lock in a time to discuss out findings and plan of attack?
If so - just book in via this link:
Thanks again Janice and hopefully we will get to work together in the near future!
Cheers
[Your Name]
support@cathowell.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
